title: Anti Blindness
description: This pack enhances visibility by removing blindness and darkness effects.
body:
# 🌌 Anti-Blindness

The **ThunderDeath Clear Vision Pack** is built to **enhance visibility and improve combat focus** by completely removing the effects of **Blindness** and **Darkness** in Minecraft. Whether you’re exploring caves, fighting mobs, or battling in PvP, this pack ensures that your screen stays bright, clear, and distraction-free.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🌑 **Anti-Blindness Effect** → Completely removes the blindness status effect.
* 🌌 **Anti-Darkness Effect** → Neutralizes the new darkness effect for a clear field of view.
* 🎯 **Better Aim Support** → With distractions gone, your aim and reaction time become sharper in PvP.
* ⚡ **Optimized Performance** → Lightweight and designed for Stable FPS.
* 📦 **Pack Format 18** → Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.20.5+**.

## 📝 Credits

* Designed and created by **ThunderDeath**.
* Inspired by the idea of bringing **clarity and focus**.

---

## 🔑 Keywords

Clear Vision, Anti Blindness, Anti Darkness, PvP, Better Aim, FPS Boost, Visibility, ThunderDeath, Performance, Minecraft 1.20.5

---

⚡ With the **Anti-Blindness**, you’ll never struggle with blindness or darkness again.
Enjoy **brighter worlds, clearer fights, and better aim** perfect for both survival and PvP.
